name: Boardroom Decision Rehearsal
description: High-stakes board meeting simulation for major strategic decisions. Tests management's ability to present, defend, and gain approval for significant initiatives while addressing diverse director perspectives.

customization.context: Facilitating board discussion and managing decision process
Providing objective oversight and challenging assumptions
Pushing for immediate value creation and strategic changes
Presenting proposal and defending management recommendations
Supporting financial analysis and risk assessment
Advising on legal and governance implications

round_structure: Management presentation: CEO and CFO present the proposal with supporting analysis
Clarifying questions: Directors seek additional information and context
Independent analysis: Directors share perspectives and concerns
Activist challenge: Activist Director pushes for modifications or alternatives
Risk and governance review: General Counsel addresses legal and fiduciary issues
Deliberation and debate: Open discussion of merits and concerns
Chair synthesis: Board Chair summarizes key points and areas of agreement
Formal motion and vote: Board votes on proposal with conditions or amendments

optional: Board member background and priority profiles

expected_deliverables: Action item list with owners and deadlines
Communication plan for shareholders and market

visibility_rules.director_priors: Each director has private concerns based on their background
visibility_rules.management_intel: Management has additional operational details not in board pack

environment_config.decision_mechanism: Formal board vote requiring majority; Chair breaks ties
environment_config.governance_constraints: Activist Director can force recorded dissent; Independent Directors can request special review
environment_config.escalation_trigger: If legal risk exceeds threshold, mandatory Counsel review before vote
environment_config.coalition_dynamics: Independent Directors coalition for balanced view; CEO-CFO for management position
